title: Composio Tool
description: Represents an individual tool action within a Composio toolkit, including its metadata, input parameters, and the toolkit it belongs to.

description.description: Description of the tool's functionality and what it does.

toolkit.description: The toolkit (application) this tool belongs to, such as 'github', 'gmail', or 'slack'.

parameters.description: JSON Schema describing the required and optional input parameters for the tool.

ParameterSchema.description: Schema describing the input parameters for a tool.

required.description: List of required input parameter names.

properties.description: Map of parameter names to their type definitions.

ParameterDefinition.description: Definition of a single input parameter for a tool.

type.description: The data type of the parameter.

default.description: Default value for the parameter when not provided.

format.description: Format hint for the parameter value, such as 'email', 'uri', or 'date-time'.
